name: /standards-diff appends a decision record without overwriting existing entries in decisions.jsonl
command:
mkdir -p standards && printf '{"decision":"adopt","change":"r1"}
' > standards/decisions.jsonl && mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'r2: a
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'r2: b
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml --decide reject --change r2 --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < standards/decisions.jsonl | tr -d ' ')" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
